content.heroSupportingText: We connect volunteers to accommodation centers in Berlin

volunteeringCategories.headerParagraph: We offer various types of volunteer opportunities with refugee accommodation centers, either on a continuous or occasional basis.

card.germanLanguageSupportInfo: Fluent in German? Support refugees by teaching german at language cafes and tutoring privately or in groups.
card.childcareInfo: We are looking for volunteers to support children in refugee accommodation centers by assisting in daycare or helping with homework. Experience with children is a plus!
card.skillsBasedVolunteeringInfo: Some opportunities may offer a chance to use your special expertise, such as bike repair, gardening, musical skills, or organizational savvy.
card.eventsInfo: Occasionally events require unique support from volunteers. These might be festivals, dinners, outings, cultural activities, a day of setting up a clothes sorting station, gardening, or a workshop.
card.sportsActivitiesInfo: We are always looking for volunteers either for tandem, clothes sorting or to help organize sports activities for children, teenagers or adults in accommodation centers.
card.accompanyARefugeeInfo: Fluent in German and a second language? Support individuals in dealing with bureaucracy at appointments - going with them to the doctor, Job Centre or otherwise.

error.postcode: Must be a valid postcode of Berlin
error.location: Please pick at least one location
error.availability: Please pick at least one time slot
error.activity: Please pick at least one activity
error.language: Please pick at least one language

thankYou.header: Thanks for your interest in volunteering with refugees :-)
thankYou.para: We will get back to you in the coming days with the next steps!

somethingWrong.para: Please check all mandatory fields and try to submit once more.

modal.already:
Already registered as a volunteer?
Copy this:

locations.para: *keep in mind that most accommodation centers are outside the ring!
locations.helpText: In case we cant find a perfect match we might send you offers that are also based on your location!

availability.para: *keep in mind that most opportunities are limited to the 9-17 working hours, at least for the beginning!
availability.helpText: The Mon-Sun availabilities refer to regularly repeating volunteering. If the time frames are limited to some periods or need explaining, please write in the comments at the last section

languages.para: *if you can't find your language, please select "Other" and indicate your preferable language in comments section bellow

languagesFluent.error: Please pick at least one language

languages.singleLevelError: Please pick a language at one level only
languages.helpText:
Fluent means you think you can support it in case some translations between languages are needed
These languages are oriented by the needs of refugees, if the language you are native or fluent at is not here, please add it in the last comment section!

activities.error: Please pick at least one activity
activities.helpText: These are the most common needs that require voluntary support. Sometimes they can change once you started volunteering.

skills.helpText: Anything you feel that you can share from your experience, abilities or expertise can  be useful to know, but don't worry, its not a must for volunteering!

leadFrom.header: Where did you hear about us?

comments.label: Comments (other languages, times, locations, activities, etc.)

thankYou.header: Thanks for filling in an opportunity helping refugees
thankYou.para: We will get back to you in the coming days with the next steps!

wentWrong.header: Sorry something went wrong on our side :-(
wentWrong.para: For now, please apply using these Google Forms:

temporaryDown.header: We apologize, but something went wrong on our site. Please contact contact@need4deed.org.

addOpportunity.bottomMsg: For assistance with any problems or queries, please reach out to: contact@need4deed.org

title.label: What help is needed in short
title.example: E.g. "Accompanying to the eye clinic" or "Crafts & painting"
title.errorTooLong: Please shorten the title to 128 chars

contactGroup.label: Contact information
contactGroup.info: Only the social team or volunteer coordinators may fill out this form.

email.label: E-mail
email.info: only an official email address of the institution can be used

fullName.label: Name
fullName.info: of the volunteer coordinator or social worker

opportunityType.helpText: There are two ways of helping: Volunteering doing various activities and Accompanying to appointments essentially providing translation

translatedInto.helpText: Please pick to what language translation is needed.

languagesTranslation.helpText: Please pick languages needed during appointment.

dateTime.label: Appointment date and time (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
dateTime.tooClose: The appointment must take place after 7 working days at the earliest.

information.label: Provide information about the task the volunteers are expected to perform

schedule.helpText: Please pick time slots or one-time event date for volunteering.

schedule.errorBoth: Please select either schedule or event date.

filters.accompanyingDesc: Only show volunteers that are open to bring residents to individual appointments
